title: IMMIGRATION LEGAL AID - 211info
text: SOMOS HISPANAS UNIDAS SILVERTON IMMIGRATION LEGAL AID Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides legal advice and representation on immigration matters to individuals in immigration proceedings before the US Citizenship and Immigration Services (USCIS) Department of Homeland Security (DHS). 512 N 1st Street Silverton, OR 97381 Eligibility: Income should not exceed the HHS Poverty Guidelines for Fee Waiver Request (USCIS Form I-912P) Hours: Monday-Friday noon-5pm Email (503) 873-7114 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 873-7114 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment. Consultations available on-site by phone or through a live video conference session. FEES: None for consultation. Nominal fees for additional services. Sliding scale fees based on an individual's ability to pay; fees may be reduced or waived according to need. In some cases, clients will also have the opportunity to request a filing fee waiver. DOCUMENTS: Varies by service LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: State of Oregon SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday noon-5pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: From Salem: 14 miles west via Silverton Road From Portland: 42 miles via I-5 South Services: Immigration/Naturalization Legal Services Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY GROUPS AND GOVERNMENT/ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICES - SOMOS HISPANAS UNIDAS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. SOMOS HISPANAS UNIDAS SILVERTON
